# Top Tier Electrical

Top Tier Electrical is a licensed and insured West Michigan electrical contractor serving residential and light commercial clients.

Primary services:
- Electrical panel upgrades and service upgrades
- EV charger installation
- Electrical troubleshooting and repairs
- Lighting and fixture installation
- Generator readiness
- Energy consulting and load planning
- Commercial electrical service and maintenance

Primary service areas:
- Holland, MI
- Grand Rapids, MI
- Byron Center, MI
- Zeeland, MI
- Saugatuck, MI
- Douglas, MI
- Hudsonville, MI
- Allegan, MI

Important URLs:
- https://toptier-electrical.com/
- https://toptier-electrical.com/services
- https://toptier-electrical.com/panel-upgrades
- https://toptier-electrical.com/ev-chargers
- https://toptier-electrical.com/electrical-repairs
- https://toptier-electrical.com/contact

Contact:
